= FRESNO, Cal, Nov 2.-Fifty-five members Of the In
dStrial Workers Of the World pleaded guilty in police
court today to violating the street speaking ordinances
They given orders to leave town before tonight The
leaders say that the national organization failed to back
the coast fight and the men became discouraged


Most Of the members of the organization from Spo
kane The police and sheriff adopted vigorous methods to
check the fight for free Speech nsgated by the
bers of the order here


Prominent merchants in court today to listen to the
proceedings. Although feeling among the industrial
workers high here there demonstration during
the trial


Members Of the order jailed last week attempted a
wholesale delivery They stopped by the sheriff
who put night patrol armed with shot guns 1t is be-
eved the Industrial Workers will cease their 'free
speech fight here.
